☠ About

Rebels & Outlaws
Helping the Helpless

South Dreams is a one-person operation out of Titusville, Florida. Built on salvaged hardware, free and open-source software, and a non-conformist spirit.

We build tools, scripts, and digital assets for real people — stuff that actually works without needing a computer science degree. One button. Done.

Everything under the South Dreams umbrella is made to help the average person take control of their tech, their files, and their digital life — without paying big tech to do it for them.

FOSS first. Salvaged everything. Dirty road to the finish line.

⚙️ Iron & Ink

Automation scripts · Tools · Utilities · Built tough, runs clean

🛣️ Dirty Road Creations

Digital assets · Design work · Creative builds · Est. 2026
